title: Alkermes — Contacts
html:
Alkermes Contact Map & Relationship Intelligence

Governing Thought

The Alkermes contact map is thin — concentrated in the Data, Analytics & Insights (DAI) organization through two established contacts (John Fritch for Lybalvi, Kurt Stauble for Vivitrol/Aristada) with a supporting IQVIA contact (Sandra Maria Rodrigues). Unlike larger accounts with multi-level organizational mapping, the Alkermes relationship is functional and transactional: ZoomRx delivers PET/SOV studies to DAI stakeholders who use the data for brand planning. The CEO transition (Pops → Jackson, August 2026) and Avadel integration create both risk (new leadership may reassess vendors) and opportunity (LUMRYZ commercial team needs research support). Expanding the contact map into the LUMRYZ/sleep medicine team is the primary relationship development priority.

Alkermes Commercial Organization (Relevant Structure)

Alkermes US Commercial Division
  |
  |--- CEO: Richard Pops (retiring Jul 31, 2026)
  |         → Blair Jackson (COO, effective Aug 1, 2026)
  |
  |--- Data, Analytics & Insights (DAI)
  |      |--- VP, DAI --- John Fritch ★ (LYBALVI PET signatory)
  |      |--- Sr. Dir., MR & CI --- Kurt Stauble ★ (VIVITROL PET signatory)
  |      |--- [Other DAI team members TBD]
  |
  |--- Psychiatry Commercial (Lybalvi, Aristada)
  |      |--- [Marketing leads TBD]
  |      |--- [Sales leadership TBD]
  |
  |--- Addiction Medicine Commercial (Vivitrol)
  |      |--- [Marketing leads TBD]
  |      |--- [Sales leadership TBD]
  |
  |--- Sleep Medicine / LUMRYZ (NEW — Avadel integration)
  |      |--- [Commercial team being integrated; contacts TBD]
  |      |--- [Former Avadel commercial leadership TBD]
  |
  |--- IQVIA / TPA
         |--- Sandra Maria Rodrigues (client contact for IQVIA TPA data access)

Note: Org chart reconstructed from SOW signatories and project data. Full reporting lines above VP level, marketing team structure, and LUMRYZ integration team are unmapped. [Populate from LinkedIn research and Sara Farina debriefs.]

Tier 1: Established Contacts (Active Business)

These are contacts with active ZoomRx projects and regular interaction.

DAI — Lybalvi

Name Title Email Working Style
John Fritch VP, Data, Analytics & Insights [Populate from SOW] Signed LYBALVI PET SOW ($338,701). Decision maker on Lybalvi research. Likely budget authority for psychiatry research. [Populate working style from Sara Farina debrief.]

DAI — Vivitrol / Aristada

Name Title Email Working Style
Kurt Stauble Sr. Director, Market Research & Competitive Intelligence [Populate from SOW] Signed Vivitrol PET SOW ($117,435). Oversees Aristada SOV Tracker. Likely manages addiction medicine and LAI research budgets. [Populate working style from Sara Farina debrief.]

IQVIA / TPA

Name Title Email Working Style
Sandra Maria Rodrigues [Title TBD] [Populate] Client contact for IQVIA TPA data access. Handles prescriber list matching for primary market research. Operational contact, not decision maker.

Tier 2: Warm Contacts (In Development)

No warm contacts currently mapped outside of the DAI org. This is a gap.

Priority contacts to develop:

  • LUMRYZ commercial team lead (Avadel integration)
  • Psychiatry marketing lead (Lybalvi brand team)
  • Above-brand insights or strategy lead (if role exists at Alkermes)
  • Blair Jackson (incoming CEO) — awareness-level only; Sara Farina should understand his priorities

Tier 3: Decision Makers (Known but Not Contacted)

Name Title Context Priority
Blair Jackson COO (CEO effective Aug 1, 2026) Will set strategic direction post-transition. No direct ZoomRx interaction. WATCH — monitor for signals on research investment priorities
Richard Pops CEO (retiring Jul 31, 2026) Staying as Board Chairman and advisor. Founded Alkermes. 30+ year tenure. LOW — departing executive role

ZoomRx Account Team

Name Role Responsibility
Sara Farina Senior Manager (Account Lead) Day-to-day relationship management; project delivery; primary contact for Alkermes DAI
Brian Gibbs PhD CCA team Analytics support; positioned for deeper quantitative work
Debasish Das CCA team Analytics support
Melissa Dale CCA team Analytics support
[AO TBD] Account Owner (Principal) [Populate — who owns Alkermes at Principal level?]

Relationship Intelligence

Working Style (What We Know)

  • DAI operates as the centralized research function; brand teams consume insights but DAI controls vendor selection and budgets
  • SOW-by-SOW engagement model (no enterprise MSA with volume commitments beyond the 2015 MSA)
  • IQVIA TPA in place — Alkermes uses IQVIA prescriber data for targeting and research sample matching
  • [Populate: meeting cadence, presentation preferences, reporting format expectations from Sara Farina]

Working Style Do's and Don'ts

Do's:

  • [Populate from Sara Farina debrief and interaction history]

Don'ts:

  • [Populate from Sara Farina debrief and interaction history]

Relationship Building Priorities

High Priority — Invest Now

  • Map LUMRYZ/Avadel commercial team contacts — the integration is active (Feb 2026 close) and research needs may be immediate
  • Confirm John Fritch's role continuity post-CEO transition — is DAI reporting structure changing?
  • Populate working style notes for Fritch and Stauble from Sara Farina

Medium Priority — Maintain and Deepen

  • Understand whether Lybalvi brand marketing is separate from DAI (could be a warm introduction path)
  • Map psychiatry sales leadership — could be relevant for Sales Force Tactical Optimization proposal ($89.5K pending)

Watch List — Monitor for Opportunity

  • Blair Jackson's priorities post-August 2026 — does the new CEO invest more or less in market research?
  • Avadel legacy vendor relationships — who did LUMRYZ use for market research before the acquisition?

Contact Map Gaps (Action Items)

  • Populate email addresses for all contacts from SOW files
  • Map Alkermes org chart above VP level (LinkedIn research)
  • Identify LUMRYZ commercial team lead
  • Identify psychiatry marketing lead (Lybalvi brand team)
  • Confirm AO (Principal) ownership of Alkermes account within ZoomRx
  • Debrief Sara Farina on working style preferences for Fritch and Stauble
  • Understand Avadel's legacy market research vendor relationships

Accounts Hub | Home
